Consider Others, Then You Can Develop and Survive.

ABOUT ME

Cheng Kang studied his Master’s degree in Shenzhen University, China from 2013 to 2016. After graduated, he was served as a research assistant from 2016 to 2017 in the University of Hong Kong for the recovery research of spinal cord injury through deep learning methods. And he was also recruited as an algorithm engineer of AI from 2017 to 2018 at Wuhan Zoncare Ltd. to help cardiologists to diagnose heart diseases by 12-lead electrocardiograms in China. From 2018 to 2019, he was studying medical AI at the University of Leicester, UK. From the September of 2020, he was a Ph.D. student in the Department of Cybernetics, Czech Technical University, Czech Republic. He now mainly focuses on the area of Translational and Computational Neuroscience, trying to bring basic findings in neuroscience into daily life applications. For example, optimization algorithm with fuzzy logics in deep learning areas, selective and sustained attentions in Transformer blocks, medical chatbots for diagnosis, treatment sugession and recovery tracking.

Research Interest:

  • Computational Neuroscience and Intelligence
  • Nature Language Processing and Generation
  • Medical Computer Vision
  • Fuzzy Logics - Optimization and Cybernetics

Research:

1. Brain Computer Interface in Mental Health

2. Gaussian Processed Labels with Fuzzy Windows for Ordinal Regression.

3. Tracking the recovery of Spinal Cord Injury

4. Medical Chatbot: Teatment Suggestion, Diseases Diagnosis and Follow-up of Recovery

== Teatment Suggestion

== Diseases Diagnosis

There are 12 disease types: Esophagitis, Enteritis, Asthma, Coronary heart disease, Pneumonia, Rhinitis, Thyroiditis, Traumatic brain injury, Dermatitis, External otitis, Conjunctivitis, Mastitis. And 118 symptom types including explicit symptoms and implicit symptoms to protect privacy as much as possible. After using random forest with 50  max_depth to train this data, and the accuracy rate can reach 82.5%.

Even trough the diagnosis rate can reach high enough, the real challenge is how accurate the chatbot can extract the symptoms from the dialogues!

Dialogue system for medical diagnosis challenge from Tencent Javis Lab.

== Follow-up of Recovery
